title: Redirect into project after successful phone lookup
description: Verifies a customer can enter a valid Spanish mobile number and is redirected into the project flow at the code-based root route.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 600000000 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify the user is redirected into a project URL with a code query parameter
Verify the customer is taken into the project flow beyond the phone entry step

title: Submit completed project from review and reach success confirmation
description: Verifies a customer can submit the project from the review section when all requirements are complete and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Complete the energy certificate survey and finalize it
Continue to the review section
Submit the documentation
Verify a success confirmation screen is visible
Verify the project is shown as submitted

title: Assessor can review a submitted project and download its ZIP package
description: Verifies an assessor can log in, open a project detail view, and initiate a ZIP download from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the first project in the projects list
Initiate the download of the project ZIP package
Verify the project detail view is displayed
Verify a download starts for the project ZIP package

title: Continue to next step after uploading required property documents
description: Verifies a customer can upload identity, IBI, and electricity bill documents and proceed to province selection with extracted data available for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid DNI/NIE front image
Wait for extraction to complete
Upload a valid IBI document image or PDF
Wait for extraction to complete
Upload one or more valid electricity bill pages
Proceed to the next step
Verify the user reaches the province selection step
Verify extracted document fields are displayed for review for the uploaded documents

title: Assessor can export the projects list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can log in and export the project list to a CSV file.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Initiate export of the projects list as CSV
Verify the projects list is displayed
Verify a download starts for the CSV export

title: Assessor can view uploaded document previews and extracted fields for a project
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project and see document previews and AI-extracted data in the detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the first project in the projects list
Verify uploaded document previews are displayed
Verify extracted project fields are displayed

title: Fix an incomplete item from review and see checklist update
description: Verifies a customer can navigate from an incomplete checklist item to fix it and return to review with the status updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Open the review section
Select an incomplete checklist item to navigate back to its section
Complete the required information for that item
Return to the review section
Verify the previously incomplete checklist item is now marked complete
Verify the checklist shows fewer incomplete items than before

title: Prompt for DNI back when front-only card is detected
description: Verifies when a DNI front photo is detected as front-only, the flow requires uploading the back photo before allowing progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a DNI front image that is detected as front-only
Wait for extraction to complete
Attempt to proceed to the next step
Verify a prompt indicates the DNI back image is required
Verify the user cannot advance past the identity document step until the back image is provided

title: Route to signing when a signing-required province is selected
description: Verifies selecting a province that requires signatures advances the customer into the representation signing section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Complete the property document upload requirements enough to reach province selection
Select Cataluña as the province
Proceed to the next step
Verify the representation signing section is displayed
Verify the flow indicates multiple signing documents are required

title: Prevent submit when checklist has incomplete items
description: Verifies the review section prevents submission when required items are incomplete and indicates what remains to be completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Open the review section
Attempt to submit the documentation while items are incomplete
Verify submission is blocked
Verify the checklist indicates at least one required item is incomplete

title: Recover from poor-quality DNI photo by re-uploading
description: Verifies the app blocks low-quality identity photos with a validation error and allows the customer to re-upload a clearer photo to proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a poor-quality DNI/NIE front image
Wait for validation to complete
Upload a clearer DNI/NIE front image
Wait for extraction to complete
Verify the poor-quality validation error is no longer shown
Verify extracted identity fields are displayed for review

title: Sign all required representation documents for Cataluña and proceed
description: Verifies a customer can sign all required representation documents for Cataluña and continue past the signing section with signed previews visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select Cataluña as the province when prompted
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the first legal document
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the second legal document
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the third legal document
Verify signed PDF previews are displayed for all required legal documents
Continue to the next section
Verify the user lands on the energy certificate section

title: Restore project step from seeded code deep-link
description: Verifies opening a seeded project code deep-link routes the customer into the correct section without phone lookup.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the project flow to load
Verify the app shows the property document upload section
Verify the phone entry step is not shown

title: Skip signing when a no-signature province is selected
description: Verifies selecting a province with no signing requirement skips the representation section and advances to the next required step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Complete the property document upload requirements enough to reach province selection
Select a province with no signing requirement
Proceed to the next step
Verify the representation signing section is skipped
Verify the user lands on the next required section after province selection

title: Complete energy certificate survey 4-step wizard and finalize with signature
description: Verifies a customer can complete all four survey steps with required fields, sign, and finalize to reach the review section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill valid housing data into the required fields
Proceed to the openings step
Fill valid openings data and select valid window options
Proceed to the thermal systems step
Select valid thermal system options
Proceed to the additional info step
Select valid additional info options
Draw a signature on the signature pad canvas
Finalize the survey
Verify the survey is marked as completed
Verify the user lands on the review section

title: Support multi-page electricity bill upload
description: Verifies the customer can add more than one page for the electricity bill and the UI reflects a multi-page upload.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Upload a valid DNI/NIE front image
Wait for extraction to complete
Upload a valid IBI document image or PDF
Wait for extraction to complete
Upload the first electricity bill page
Upload an additional electricity bill page
Verify multiple electricity bill pages are listed or previewed as part of the same document upload
Verify the customer can continue past the electricity bill step

title: Skip the energy certificate survey from the start screen
description: Verifies a customer can choose to skip the energy certificate survey and is routed directly to the review section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Choose to skip the survey
Verify the user lands on the review section
Verify the energy certificate survey is not marked as completed

title: Skip representation signing when province does not require it
description: Verifies selecting a province with no signing requirement skips the representation signing section and routes the customer forward.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select a province that does not require representation signing
Continue to the next section
Verify the representation signing section is skipped
Verify the user lands on the energy certificate section

title: Assessor can log out and return to the dashboard login screen
description: Verifies an assessor can end their session from the dashboard and is returned to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Log out
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Require a plausible phone number format before submitting
description: Verifies the phone entry prevents submission with an invalid phone number format and prompts the user to correct it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 123 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify a phone number validation error is visible
Verify the user is not redirected into a project flow

title: Enforce required-field validation in the energy certificate wizard
description: Verifies the survey prevents advancing when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback until corrected.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Attempt to proceed from the housing data step without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Fill valid housing data into the required fields
Proceed to the openings step
Verify the openings step is displayed

title: Redraw too-small signature and update signed preview
description: Verifies a customer can redraw a signature deemed too small and the signed document preview updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Select a province that requires signing when prompted
Draw a very small signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the first legal document
Verify a signature size validation error is visible
Redraw a larger signature on the signature pad canvas
Apply the signature to the first legal document
Verify a signed PDF preview is displayed for the first legal document

title: Incorrect dashboard password blocks access and shows an authentication error
description: Verifies entering an incorrect password keeps the user on the dashboard login screen and displays an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the dashboard login screen

title: Show error when phone number is not found
description: Verifies an unknown phone number does not redirect and shows a not-found error so the customer knows they cannot proceed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill 699999999 into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify a phone number not found error is visible
Verify the customer remains on the phone entry step

title: Dashboard login requires a password
description: Verifies submitting the dashboard login form without a password shows a validation error and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Submit the login form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the dashboard login screen
